response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in C++ and has worked on various projects, but lacks direct experience in the industrial automation sector and some specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Proven C++ experience from work at National Instruments
Strong background in software development with diverse technologies
Experience with testing and secure development practices
concerns: No direct experience in industrial automation or cloud platform solutions
Lack of specific experience with protocols like Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850
Not directly familiar with Microsoft Azure cloud services
